title: ELEGANT BABY Beary Nice Cream Palm Moses Basket with Deluxe Natural Rocking Stand, Adjustable Hood, Fibre Mattress & Padded Liner
features: ✔ 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐭 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐁𝐚𝐛𝐲: The soft and cushioned interior of the Palm moses basket with rocking stand ensures a cosy and comfortable spot for your baby. In this baby Moses basket your baby will feel snug and secure while you attend to their needs.

✔ 𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐢𝐬 𝐈𝐧𝐜𝐥𝐮𝐝𝐞𝐝: This moses basket with stand is the perfect starter bed set for your little one. Each bundle includes a Palm Moses basket, fibre mattress, padded liner, complete bedding set including full body surround, padded quilt, and a Little Gem Rocking Stand.

✔ 𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐲 𝐭𝐨 𝐀𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐦𝐛𝐥𝐞: Setting up this Moses Basket is as effortless as spreading holiday cheer, no tools required! Its lightweight design and easy disassembly make it perfect for new parents on the go, whether at home or traveling for the holidays. A thoughtful gift for new parents, this cozy and stylish basket ensures a snug and festive sleeping space for little ones during the season of joy.

✔ 𝐇𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐜𝐫𝐚𝐟𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲: Elegant baby moses baskets are lovingly handcrafted with attention to detail, ensuring its durability and uniqueness. You can trust in its quality to stand the test of time and serve you for years.

✔ 𝐂𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐫 𝐒𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐬𝐟𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: We believe in providing the best care to our customers by providing stylish and high-quality products. Our Palm Moses basket bedding is made with high-quality materials. We are at your service in case of any queries related to the product.
description: Product Description Meet Our Beary Nice Cream Palm Moses Basket! Suitable from newborn, the palm Moses basket with rocking stand is the perfect starter bed for your little one and will send them to sleep in next to no time. This palm Moses basket and rocking stand features a cute, unisex printed design which will be a great edition for any household or nursery. Why Choose Kinder Valley? With over 30 years experience in the world of infant sleep and nursery products, Kinder Valley are truly the experts. Based on the idea that every child deserves and needs a great night’s sleep, our ethos is simple- “deliver the best possible quality, at a value parents can afford”. Often, feedback from our thousands of happy customers tells us Kinder Valley is the best quality AND the best value? Everything we do comes from a place of love and warmth, we are a happy team who love supplying the very best nursery products. We take huge pride in the fact that thousands of parents trust us with their little one’s sleep. We understand the importance of a safe and comfortable environment for your baby to sleep and grow, which is why all our products are carefully crafted with love and care. Our Moses baskets are made from the softest materials and are designed to ensure maximum comfort for your little one. Our cots, cribs and beds are made with sturdy and durable materials, ensuring the safety and security of your little one at all times. Meet Our Mascot! Whats inside? Our Beary Nice Moses Palm Moses Basket Complete with a Hooded Sun Shade, Padded Liner, Complete Bedding Set and Mattress! This palm Moses basket and rocking stand features a cute, unisex printed design which will be a great edition for any household or nursery. The bedding and padded quilt are made from our luxury easy-care polycotton material and has a soft full body surround for added protection and comfort. This basket also includes a comfortable mattress that you can be certain your baby will sleep peacefully at night on. What Am I Getting? Relax Your Little One The surrounding basket is the perfect place for your little one making them feel comfortable and secure. Suitable For New Borns Coming suitable for new borns you can be sure your little one will love this Beary Nice Palm Moses Basket. Tested To British standards All of our products are tested to the highest of British Standards so you can sure your little one is always safe and sound when using our products! !00% Pine Wood Stand All of our wood is lovingly sourced from New Zealand so you can be sure of where our wood has originated from.
